title: Add vertical viewport to Pi dashboard overlay
description: Implement terminal-height-aware vertical scrolling or bounded viewport for dashboard overlay so recovery lanes, human gates and controls remain reachable in a 24-row terminal. Preserve selection/navigation and pure rendering across TUI/RPC/dump. Add clipping/scroll tests.
acceptance_criteria: All dashboard sections and controls are reachable at standard terminal height; navigation scrolls selected rows into view; non-TUI rendering stays deterministic; tests pass.
